description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle with a robust, angular body designed for urban warfare. The exterior features reinforced panels, sloped armor, and multiple weapon mounts, including a large turret cannon on the roof and side-mounted missile launchers. The vehicle has four large, rugged off-road tires with deep treads, suitable for traversing rough terrain. The windows are small and reinforced, providing protection while maintaining visibility for occupants. Additional equipment such as external storage, exhaust pipes, and utility fixtures are visible along the sides. The overall color scheme is a light gray with black and red accents, giving it a modern, intimidating appearance.
description: A heavily armored, angular combat tactical vehicle with a roof-mounted turret, side missile launchers, and rugged off-road tires. Its light gray body is accented with black and red details.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armored hood, reinforced bumper, and the prominent roof turret.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the large cannon turret, side missile launcher, and rugged tire details.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the armored back doors, dual exhausts, and rear-mounted equipment.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals another missile launcher, utility canister, and the angular armored panels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large turret cannon on the roof, two side-mounted missile launchers (one on each side), and additional small mounts on the roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped, and angular armor plating; reinforced doors and hood; visible modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid light gray with black and red accent panels; no camouflage pattern visible.
attribute_tire_type: Four large off-road tires with deep, aggressive tread pattern; appear reinforced for heavy-duty use.
